name: 10_mixed_signs_cancellation
description: Two qualifying holdings with EQUAL-MAGNITUDE OPPOSITE-SIGN (p-v)/v ratios and equal allocations -> diff contributions cancel to exactly 0.0; weight is sum of allocs.
derivation: AAPL: 0.5*(110-100)/100 = 0.5*0.10 = 0.05. QQQ: 0.5*(90-100)/100 = 0.5*(-0.10) = -0.05. Sum: 0.05 + (-0.05) = 0.0. Weight: 0.5 + 0.5 = 1.0. Final: (0.0, 1.0). This pins the additive-cancellation behaviour: the producer does NOT take absolute values; signed (p-v)/v matters.
